case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. LEWIS, JULIUS WAYNE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JULIUS WAYNE
